title: Simple Task List Generator
scenario: Create a simple task list generator that takes in a user's tasks and deadlines. The tool should output a formatted task list with the tasks and deadlines. Ensure the format meets standard task list requirements.
constraints: Must use standard task list formatting

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated markdown adheres to the constraints.
Check if the tasks and deadlines are included in the output.
Check if the generated markdown is correctly formatted.
